role: This directory defines architectural and naming conventions for the ArchSpine mirror system.
responsibility: It establishes layer-specific constraints for the CLI->services->core/tasks/engines->infra model, and enforces consistent naming patterns including interface prefixes and test file suffixes.

children.role: Defines architectural boundary rules for the ArchSpine mirror system's layered model (CLI -> services -> core/tasks/engines -> infra), ensuring each layer stays within its responsibilities.
Define naming conventions for the codebase to ensure consistency and facilitate automated enforcement.
